brand.name: Gospel Roots Lawn Care
brand.tagline: Serving with Faith. Committed to Quality.

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. py-24 to py-32 for sections. gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento-style grids for Gallery and Services. Asymmetric layouts for About section.

hero.description: Lush green lawn at sunrise, premium landscaping feel

mapping.Faith/Roots: Cross (custom SVG or subtly represented via tree/root icon)

sections_strategy.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80). Minimalist logo displaying a cross with roots. Desktop links visible, button CTA.
sections_strategy.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]). Lush background image with bg-black/40 overlay for readability. Center or left-aligned Serif H1 'Professional Lawn Care Rooted in Faith'. Primary green CTA button.
sections_strategy.about: Asymmetric layout. Text content and founders' story on one side, overlapping a solid green block with the landscaper image on the other.
sections_strategy.services: Bento-grid styled cards. White background with soft borders. Display service title, short description, and an icon. Hover effect lifts the card (-translate-y-1) and deepens the shadow.
sections_strategy.why_choose_us: Icon-driven feature list. Earthy Brown icons to ground the section. Text highlights reliability, faith, and quality.
sections_strategy.gallery: Before/After layout side-by-side or using a slider component. Images have rounded-2xl corners to match organic shapes.
sections_strategy.testimonials: Clean white cards with light shadow-sm. Use masonry or horizontal scroll layout.
sections_strategy.contact: 2-column layout. Left: Contact info and FAQ accordion. Right: Contact form using customized Shadcn components (Input, Textarea, Button).
sections_strategy.footer: Dark green background (#1B4332). Earthy brown accents and light text. Generous py-20 padding.

motion.rules: Fade-in-up animations for text blocks and cards as they scroll into view. Smooth, subtle hover transitions on interactive elements.
